replies.msg:
Actual science has shown that there’s no reason to cycle off creatine. While you take it, your body’s own production of creatine will slow some, but it will continue to produce it, and your natural levels will return to normal if/when you do stop taking it. And as discussed above, there have been no negative side-effects found with the daily, prolonged use.

https://www.artofmanliness.com/articles/creatine-faq/

感覺落返地再上果下已經釋放左好多下背壓力，保持到個背自然伸直，上果下唔好升高個身太多就唔會擺太負荷去下背

progressive overload模式一問
想問邊個加weight方法合理D
例子
例如我玩開5-8下, 3組
我比盡可以推胸推60kg 6下
我應該第一組留力直到3組都可以8下先加細餅
定係第一組爆盡8下 第2組drop weight 去返5-8?

scenario 1 留力:
set 1 : 60 kg x 5
set 2 : 60 kg x 5
set 3 : 60 kg x 5

之後就每次1 rep 1 rep咁加 , 直到全部8, 就加餅仔
下次
set 1 : 60 kg x 6
set 2 : 60 kg x 5
set 3 : 60 kg x 5
如此類推

scenario 2 全部比盡:
set 1 : 60 kg x 6
set 2 : 55 kg x 7 (60做唔到5下所以drop)
set 3 : 55 kg x 6

下次練就每組獨自計 做到8下就加餅
set 1 : 60 kg x 7 (可能淨係得呢組進步到)
set 2 : 55 kg x 7
set 3 : 55 kg x 6

quote.msg:
progressive overload模式一問
想問邊個加weight方法合理D
例子
例如我玩開5-8下, 3組
我比盡可以推胸推60kg 6下
我應該第一組留力直到3組都可以8下先加細餅
定係第一組爆盡8下 第2組drop weight 去返5-8?

scenario 1 留力:
set 1 : 60 kg x 5
set 2 : 60 kg x 5
set 3 : 60 kg x 5

之後就每次1 rep 1 rep咁加 , 直到全部8, 就加餅仔
下次
set 1 : 60 kg x 6
set 2 : 60 kg x 5
set 3 : 60 kg x 5
如此類推

scenario 2 全部比盡:
set 1 : 60 kg x 6
set 2 : 55 kg x 7 (60做唔到5下所以drop)
set 3 : 55 kg x 6

下次練就每組獨自計 做到8下就加餅
set 1 : 60 kg x 7 (可能淨係得呢組進步到)
set 2 : 55 kg x 7
set 3 : 55 kg x 6

Barbell推到1.2x bw 10 reps就會做到單手push up，膊掂到地、窄腳嗰隻。
單身引體就起碼要先做到捉住另一隻手嘅簡易版單手引體七八下先，再progress加20kg負重pull up起碼8下。利申bw得70公斤，如果你100公斤，咁可能有出入。

單手push up好針對前膊 單手pull up好針對core,lat同shoulder&elbow tendon

day1 胸 二頭 肩

day4 背

通常每part操6個動作，每個動作3-4set 10-12reps
關於動作就
例如：胸就夾》推》夾》推
肩就推》飛鳥》推》飛鳥

原本想操8日抖1日

Actual science has shown that there’s no reason to cycle off creatine. While you take it, your body’s own production of creatine will slow some, but it will continue to produce it, and your natural levels will return to normal if/when you do stop taking it. Actual science has shown that there’s no reason to cycle off creatine. While you take it, your body’s own production of creatine will slow some, but it will continue to produce it, and your natural levels will return to normal if/when you do stop taking it. And as discussed above, there have been no negative side-effects found with the daily, prolonged use.

https://www.artofmanliness.com/articles/creatine-faq/

replies.msg:
DL係複合動作，傳統同相撲都係練背穩定+臀腿力量。

Sumo bar path一定會短左，理論上易左，會用多左四頭，glute hamstring會用少左，臀部個開始角度大左，本身四頭勁再加臀部比較緊多數係會拉得重啲

冇特別目標嘅話交差練下都好，有新刺激冇咁單調。
